title: CreateMore
description: CreateMore is forked of justcreate smp 2 with optimization and more addons for our createmore smp which is open for everyone
body:
**Welcome to CreateMore!**

**Modded need to add manually ** (if you face issu)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-chunks-forge https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/6798283 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard

⚙️Building on the incredible foundation of the Just Create SMP 2 pack, we’ve taken the gears, cogs, and belts to the next level. This is a refined, high-performance experience designed for engineers who want more power, better frames, and a smoother survival journey.🚀 What’s New?While we kept the core spirit of the original SMP, we’ve made some serious upgrades:Ultimate **Optimization:** 

We’ve gutted the lag. With a curated suite of performance mods, you’ll experience smoother chunk loading and higher FPS, even when your factories grow to massive proportions.The Industry Expansion: We’ve integrated heavy-hitters like TFMG (The Factory Must Grow). Dive into advanced fluid processing, chemical engineering, and realistic industrial automation that goes far beyond basic kinetic power.More Create Add-ons: We’ve added a variety of curated extensions (like Create: Steam 'n' Rails and Create: Crafts & Additions) to give you more decorative blocks and functional components.Quality of Life (QoL): Better inventory management, cleaner UI elements, and small tweaks that make the "grind" feel like a breeze so you can focus on building.🛠️ Key FeaturesFeatureDescriptionPerformancePowered by the latest optimization mods for a stutter-free experience.IndustrializationUtilize TFMG for oil refining, steel production, and more.LogisticsAdvanced train systems and improved item transport methods.Multiplayer ReadyBalanced and tweaked specifically for a community environment.🌐 Join the CommunityWe don't just provide the pack; we host the world. Whether you need technical support, want to share your latest contraption, or are looking for a team to build a mega-factory with, our Discord is the place to be.
Join our 

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/qns3PZ96FG
Start your engines. The factory is waiting.

(modpack if fork of justcreate smp 2 modpack from beardstone all right reserved and it has few modded added extra all right reserved to mod owners and few mods like ftb and others are not from modrinth listed are from curseforge)
